name: schematic-layer-parallel
description: DDL generator is the SQL equivalent of the schematic layer. Schematic: ArkType → Enhanced JSON Schema → MST Models. DDL: Enhanced JSON Schema → SQL DDL. Both are transformation pipelines, not services. Both operate on schemas.
recommendation: Confirms Infrastructure archetype. DDL is a projection mechanism like schematic. Could even be co-located in schematic/ or as sibling src/ddl/.
